MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MICHAEL FIRESTONE, Esq. of Marvine Firestone, MD-JD & Associates, LLP (Tel: 650-212-4900) for petitioner Mary Kay Marina Brewster;
Atty. REBECCA L. SMITH, Esq. of California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 213-269-6475) for respondent Medical Board of California.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER MARY KAY BREWSTER's Petition for Writ of Mandate.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.
